ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_hugo_id" TEXT /* HUGO Gene Nomenclature Committee ID for the gene */,
  "gene_entrez_id" INTEGER /* Entrez Gene ID for the gene */,
  "gene_normalized" TEXT /* Normalized name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene and its function */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Alternative name for the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancers" (
  "cancer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_doid" TEXT /* Disease Ontology ID for the cancer */,
  "cancer_normalized" TEXT /* Normalized name of the cancer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer and its characteristics */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "cancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer */,
  "synonym_name" TEXT /* Synonym for the cancer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_cancer_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-cancer role */,
  "matching_id" TEXT /* Matching ID used to uniquely identify the gene-cancer relationship */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "cancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role the gene plays in the cancer (e.g., Oncogene, Tumor Suppressor) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the gene-cancer relationship */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_cancer_roles_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_cancer_roles_cancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_id") REFERENCES cancers ("cancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene-cancer role being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "normalization_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each normalization history entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "cancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer */,
  "normalized_status" TEXT /* Normalization status (e.g., 'Normalized', 'Not Normalized') */,
  "normalization_date" TEXT /* Date when the normalization was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_normalization_history_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_normalization_history_cancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_id") REFERENCES cancers ("cancer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene-cancer role being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the role */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES gene_cancer_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene mutation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., point mutation, deletion) */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_mutations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer progression */,
  "cancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene mutation */,
  "progression_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer progression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_progression_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES gene_mutations ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_progression_cancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_id") REFERENCES cancers ("cancer_id")
)
